zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippe de Croy於1435年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫時，他的父親Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot45歲，母親Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot16歲。他和Jacqueline de Luxembourg至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1511年9月14日享年76歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippe de Croy于1435年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫时，他的父亲Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot45岁，母亲Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot16岁。他和Jacqueline de Luxembourg至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1511年9月14日享年76岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Croy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Orkney): habitational name from any of several places called Croy, for example in Inverness-shire.
Probably also Irish: shortened form of   McCroy  , which is a variant of   McRoy  .

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philippe de Croy was born in 1435, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot, was 45 and his mother, Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot, was 16. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Jacqueline de Luxembourg. He died on 14 September 1511, at the age of 76, and was buried in Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippe de Croy est né en 1435, à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Jacqueline de Luxembourg. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1511, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippe de Croy 1435 in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot 45 und seine Mutter Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot 16. Er hatte mit Jacqueline de Luxembourg mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. September 1511 im Alter von 76 Jahren und wurde in Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe de Croy è nato il nel 1435 nel Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Jacqueline de Luxembourg. Morì il 14 settembre 1511, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippe de Croyが1435年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーで生まれた時，父Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschotは45歳，母Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschotは16歳であった。彼はJacqueline de Luxembourgとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1511年9月14日に76歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippe de Croy(이)가 1435년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Jacqueline de Luxembourg(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1511년 9월 14일 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe de Croy nasceu em 1435, em Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Jacqueline de Luxembourg. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1511, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippe de Croy родился в 1435 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot, 16. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Jacqueline de Luxembourg. Он умер 14 сентября 1511 г. в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippe de Croy nació en 1435, en Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Graaf Antoine I 'de Grote" van Croy Heer van Croy, Renty en Aarschot, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margaretha van Lotharingen Vrouwe van Aerschot, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Jacqueline de Luxembourg. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1511, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
